description.ja: AreaEffectCloud の効果が付与される時に呼び出される。5ティック毎に1回発生する。
description.en: Called when a lingering potion applies its effects. Happens once every 5 ticks.

events.javadoc: Called when a lingering potion applies it's effects. Happens once every 5 ticks
events.name: AreaEffectCloudApplyEvent

description.ja: プレイヤーがチャットした時に呼び出される。非同期でも同期でも呼び出されることがある。
description.en: This event will sometimes fire synchronously, depending on how it was triggered.

events.javadoc: This event will sometimes fire synchronously, depending on how it was triggered. The constructor provides a boolean to indicate if the event was fired synchronously or asynchronously. When asynchronous, this event can be called from any thread, sans the main thread, and has limited access to the API. If a player is the direct cause of this event by an incoming packet, this event will be asynchronous. If a plugin triggers this event by compelling a player to chat, this event will be synchronous. Care should be taken to check Event.isAsynchronous() and treat the event appropriately.
events.name: AsyncPlayerChatEvent

description.ja: プレイヤーがログインしようとしている時に呼び出される。非同期で処理される。
description.en: Stores details for players attempting to log in.

events.javadoc: Stores details for players attempting to log in. This event is asynchronous, and not run using main thread.
events.name: AsyncPlayerPreLoginEvent

description.ja: ビーコンの効果がプレイヤーに適用される時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a beacon effect is being applied to a player.

events.javadoc: Called when a beacon effect is being applied to a player.
events.name: BeaconEffectEvent

description.ja: プレイヤーがブロックを破壊する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a block is broken by a player.

events.javadoc: Called when a block is broken by a player. If you wish to have the block drop experience, you must set the experience value above 0. By default, experience will be set in the event if: The player is not in creative or adventure mode The player can loot the block (ie: does not destroy it completely, by using the correct tool) The player does not have silk touch The block drops experience in vanilla Minecraft Note: Plugins wanting to simulate a traditional block drop should set the block to air and utilize their own methods for determining what the default drop for the block being broken is and what to do about it, if anything. If a Block Break event is cancelled, the block will not break and experience will not drop.
events.name: BlockBreakEvent

description.ja: ブロックが燃え尽きて破壊される時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a block is destroyed as a result of being burnt by fire.

events.javadoc: Called when a block is destroyed as a result of being burnt by fire. If a Block Burn event is cancelled, the block will not be destroyed as a result of being burnt by fire.
events.name: BlockBurnEvent

description.ja: ブロックを設置しようとした時に呼び出される。設置可能かどうかを確認する。
description.en: Called when we try to place a block, to see if we can build it here or not. Note: The Block returned by getBlock() is the block we are trying to place on, not the block we are trying to place. If you want to figure out what is being placed, use getMaterial() instead.

events.javadoc: Called when we try to place a block, to see if we can build it here or not. Note: The Block returned by getBlock() is the block we are trying to place on, not the block we are trying to place. If you want to figure out what is being placed, use getMaterial() or getMaterialId() instead.
events.name: BlockCanBuildEvent

description.ja: プレイヤーがブロックを損傷させる時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a block is damaged by a player. If a Block Damage event is cancelled, the block will not be damaged.

events.javadoc: Called when a block is damaged by a player. If a Block Damage event is cancelled, the block will not be damaged.
events.name: BlockDamageEvent

description.ja: ディスペンサーからアイテムが射出される時に呼び出される。このイベントをキャンセルしても射出されたアイテムは減る。BlockPreDispenseEvent を使うことでアイテムの消費もキャンセルできる。
description.en: Called when an item is dispensed from a block. If a Block Dispense event is cancelled, the block will not dispense the item.

events.javadoc: Called when an item is dispensed from a block. If a Block Dispense event is cancelled, the block will not dispense the item.
events.name: BlockDispenseEvent

description.ja: ブロックに関するイベントであることを表す。
description.en: Represents a block related event.

events.javadoc: Represents a block related event.
events.name: BlockEvent

description.ja: ブロックが経験値を落とす時に呼び出される。
description.en: An event that's called when a block yields experience.

events.javadoc: An event that's called when a block yields experience.
events.name: BlockExpEvent

description.ja: ブロックが爆発する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a block explodes. Note that due to the nature of explosions, BlockEvent.getBlock() will always be an air block. getExplodedBlockState() should be used to get information about the block state that exploded.

events.javadoc: Called when a block explodes
events.name: BlockExplodeEvent

description.ja: 自然にブロックが溶けたり消滅したりする時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a block fades, melts or disappears based on world conditions.

events.javadoc: Called when a block fades, melts or disappears based on world conditions Examples: Snow melting due to being near a light source. Ice melting due to being near a light source. Fire burning out after time, without destroying fuel block. If a Block Fade event is cancelled, the block will not fade, melt or disappear.
events.name: BlockFadeEvent

description.ja: 自然にブロックが形成される時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a block is formed or spreads based on world conditions.

events.javadoc: Called when a block is formed or spreads based on world conditions. Use BlockSpreadEvent to catch blocks that actually spread and don't just "randomly" form. Examples: Snow forming due to a snow storm. Ice forming in a snowy Biome like Taiga or Tundra. Obsidian / Cobblestone forming due to contact with water. Concrete forming due to mixing of concrete powder and water. If a Block Form event is cancelled, the block will not be formed.
events.name: BlockFormEvent

description.ja: ブロックの変更が起こる時に呼び出される。
description.en: Represents events with a source block and a destination block, currently only applies to liquid (lava and water) and teleporting dragon eggs.

events.javadoc: Represents events with a source block and a destination block, currently only applies to liquid (lava and water) and teleporting dragon eggs. If a Block From To event is cancelled, the block will not move (the liquid will not flow).
events.name: BlockFromToEvent

description.ja: 自然に作物等が成長する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a block grows naturally in the world.

events.javadoc: Called when a block grows naturally in the world. Examples: Wheat Sugar Cane Cactus Watermelon Pumpkin If a Block Grow event is cancelled, the block will not grow.
events.name: BlockGrowEvent

description.ja: ブロックが点火された時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a block is ignited. If you want to catch when a Player places fire, you need to use BlockPlaceEvent.

events.javadoc: Called when a block is ignited. If you want to catch when a Player places fire, you need to use BlockPlaceEvent. If a Block Ignite event is cancelled, the block will not be ignited.
events.name: BlockIgniteEvent

description.ja: プレイヤーがマルチブロックを設置する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Fired when a single block placement action of a player triggers the creation of multiple blocks (e.g. placing a bed block).

events.javadoc: Fired when a single block placement action of a player triggers the creation of multiple blocks(e.g. placing a bed block). The block returned by BlockPlaceEvent.getBlockPlaced() and its related methods is the block where the placed block would exist if the placement only affected a single block.
events.name: BlockMultiPlaceEvent

description.ja: ブロックの落下確認をする時に呼び出される。高頻度で呼び出されるので処理には注意が必要。
description.en: Thrown when a block physics check is called. This event is a high frequency event, it may be called thousands of times per a second on a busy server.

events.javadoc: Thrown when a block physics check is called
events.name: BlockPhysicsEvent

description.ja: ピストンが動作する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a piston block is triggered.

events.javadoc: Called when a piston block is triggered
events.name: BlockPistonEvent

description.ja: ピストンが伸びる時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a piston extends.

events.javadoc: Called when a piston extends
events.name: BlockPistonExtendEvent

description.ja: ピストンが縮む時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a piston retracts.

events.javadoc: Called when a piston retracts
events.name: BlockPistonRetractEvent

description.ja: プレイヤーがブロックを設置する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a block is placed by a player. If a Block Place event is cancelled, the block will not be placed.

events.javadoc: Called when a block is placed by a player. If a Block Place event is cancelled, the block will not be placed.
events.name: BlockPlaceEvent

description.ja: レッドストーンの強さが変化する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a redstone current changes.

events.javadoc: Called when a redstone current changes
events.name: BlockRedstoneEvent

description.ja: ブロックが拡散する時に呼び出される。BlockFormEvent とは違い、ランダムに形成されるブロックに対して呼び出される。以下に例を示す。 - キノコが増える時。 - 火が燃え広がる時。
description.en: Called when a block spreads based on world conditions. Use BlockFormEvent to catch blocks that "randomly" form instead of actually spread. Examples: Mushrooms spreading. Fire spreading.

events.javadoc: Called when a block spreads based on world conditions. Use BlockFormEvent to catch blocks that "randomly" form instead of actually spread. Examples: Mushrooms spreading. Fire spreading. If a Block Spread event is cancelled, the block will not spread.
events.name: BlockSpreadEvent

description.ja: 醸造が完了する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when the brewing of the contents inside the Brewing Stand is complete.

events.javadoc: Called when the brewing of the contents inside the Brewing Stand is complete.
events.name: BrewEvent

description.ja: 燃料としてアイテムが醸造台に使用される時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an ItemStack is about to increase the fuel level of a brewing stand.

events.javadoc: Called when an ItemStack is about to increase the fuel level of a brewing stand.
events.name: BrewingStandFuelEvent

description.ja: サーバーにブロードキャストメッセージが送信された時に呼び出される。メッセージが非同期で送信された場合、イベントも非同期で呼び出される。
description.en: Event triggered for server broadcast messages.

events.javadoc: Event triggered for server broadcast messages such as from Server.broadcast(String, String).
events.name: BroadcastMessageEvent

description.ja: 大釜の水が増えたり減ったりした時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when the water level in a cauldron changes.

description.ja: チャンクに関するイベントであることを表す
description.en: Represents a Chunk related event.

events.javadoc: Represents a Chunk related event
events.name: ChunkEvent

description.ja: チャンクが読み込まれた時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a chunk is loaded.

events.javadoc: Called when a chunk is loaded
events.name: ChunkLoadEvent

description.ja: 新しいチャンクが作られた時に呼び出される。
description.en: Thrown when a newly generated chunk has finished being populated.

events.javadoc: Thrown when a new chunk has finished being populated. If your intent is to populate the chunk using this event, please see BlockPopulator
events.name: ChunkPopulateEvent

description.ja: チャンクの読み込みが停止された時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a chunk is unloaded.

events.javadoc: Called when a chunk is unloaded
events.name: ChunkUnloadEvent

description.ja: アイテムをクラフトする時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when the recipe of an Item is completed inside a crafting matrix.

events.javadoc: Called when the recipe of an Item is completed inside a crafting matrix.
events.name: CraftItemEvent

description.ja: 生き物がスポーンする時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a creature is spawned into a world.

events.javadoc: Called when a creature is spawned into a world. If a Creature Spawn event is cancelled, the creature will not spawn.
events.name: CreatureSpawnEvent

description.ja: クリーパーが雷撃を受ける時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a Creeper is struck by lightning.

events.javadoc: Called when a Creeper is struck by lightning. If a Creeper Power event is cancelled, the Creeper will not be powered.
events.name: CreeperPowerEvent

description.ja: アイテムにエンチャントした時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an ItemStack is successfully enchanted.

events.javadoc: Called when an ItemStack is successfully enchanted (currently at enchantment table)
events.name: EnchantItemEvent

description.ja: エンダードラゴンの攻撃フェーズが変わった時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an EnderDragon switches controller phase.

events.javadoc: Called when an EnderDragon switches controller phase.
events.name: EnderDragonChangePhaseEvent

description.ja: 何らかの理由でワールドにエンティティが増えた時に呼び出される。
description.en: Fired any time an entity is being added to the world for any reason (including a chunk loading). Not to be confused with CreatureSpawnEvent.

events.javadoc: Fired any time an entity is being added to the world for any reason. Not to be confused with CreatureSpawnEvent This will fire anytime a chunk is reloaded too.
events.name: EntityAddToWorldEvent

description.ja: エンティティの残り酸素量が変化する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when the amount of air an entity has remaining changes.

events.javadoc: Called when the amount of air an entity has remaining changes.
events.name: EntityAirChangeEvent

description.ja: エンティティによってブロックが形成される時に呼び出される。以下に例を示す。 - スノーゴーレムによって雪が形成された時。 - 氷渡りのエンチャントによって氷が形成された時。
description.en: Called when a block is formed by entities. Examples: Snow formed by a Snowman. Frosted Ice formed by the Frost Walker enchantment.

events.javadoc: Called when a block is formed by entities. Examples: Snow formed by a Snowman. Frosted Ice formed by the Frost Walker enchantment.
events.name: EntityBlockFormEvent

description.ja: エンティティによってドアが破壊される時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an Entity breaks a door. Cancelling the event will cause the event to be delayed.

events.javadoc: Called when an Entity breaks a door Cancelling the event will cause the event to be delayed
events.name: EntityBreakDoorEvent

description.ja: エンティティが繁殖する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when one Entity breeds with another Entity.

events.javadoc: Called when one Entity breeds with another Entity.
events.name: EntityBreedEvent

description.ja: エンティティがブロックを変化させる時に呼び出される。適したイベントが見当たらない時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when any Entity changes a block and a more specific event is not available.

events.javadoc: Called when any Entity, excluding players, changes a block.
events.name: EntityChangeBlockEvent

description.ja: ブロックによってエンティティが炎上する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a block causes an entity to combust.

events.javadoc: Called when a block causes an entity to combust.
events.name: EntityCombustByBlockEvent

description.ja: エンティティによってエンティティが炎上する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an entity causes another entity to combust.

events.javadoc: Called when an entity causes another entity to combust.
events.name: EntityCombustByEntityEvent

description.ja: エンティティが炎上する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an entity combusts. If an Entity Combust event is cancelled, the entity will not combust.

events.javadoc: Called when an entity combusts. If an Entity Combust event is cancelled, the entity will not combust.
events.name: EntityCombustEvent

description.ja: エンティティがポータルを作成する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Thrown when a Living Entity creates a portal in a world.

events.javadoc: Thrown when a Living Entity creates a portal in a world.
events.name: EntityCreatePortalEvent

description.ja: ブロックによってエンティティがダメージを受ける時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an entity is damaged by a block.

events.javadoc: Called when an entity is damaged by a block
events.name: EntityDamageByBlockEvent

description.ja: エンティティによってエンティティがダメージを受ける時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an entity is damaged by another entity.

events.javadoc: Called when an entity is damaged by an entity
events.name: EntityDamageByEntityEvent

description.ja: エンティティがダメージを受ける時に呼び出される。
description.en: Stores data for damage events.

events.javadoc: Stores data for damage events
events.name: EntityDamageEvent

description.ja: エンティティが死ぬ時に呼び出される。
description.en: Thrown whenever a LivingEntity dies.

events.javadoc: Thrown whenever a LivingEntity dies
events.name: EntityDeathEvent

description.ja: エンティティが乗っているエンティティが降りる時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an entity stops riding another entity.

events.javadoc: Called when an entity stops riding another entity.
events.name: EntityDismountEvent

description.ja: エンティティに関するイベントであることを表す。
description.en: Represents an Entity-related event.

events.javadoc: Represents an Entity-related event
events.name: EntityEvent

description.ja: エンティティが爆発する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an entity explodes.

events.javadoc: Called when an entity explodes
events.name: EntityExplodeEvent

description.ja: エンティティ同士が押し合う時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an entity interacts with an object.

events.javadoc: Called when an entity interacts with an object
events.name: EntityInteractEvent

description.ja: エンティティがエンティティに乗る時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an entity attempts to ride another entity.

events.javadoc: Called when an entity attempts to ride another entity.
events.name: EntityMountEvent

description.ja: エンティティが目的の場所への移動を開始する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Fired when an Entity decides to start moving towards a location.

events.javadoc: Fired when an Entity decides to start moving towards a location. This event does not fire for the entities actual movement. Only when it is choosing to start moving to a location.
events.name: EntityPathfindEvent

description.ja: エンティティが地面からアイテムを拾う時に呼び出される。
description.en: Thrown when an entity picks an item up from the ground.

events.javadoc: Thrown when a entity picks an item up from the ground
events.name: EntityPickupItemEvent

description.ja: エンティティがポータルに接触した時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an entity comes into contact with a portal.

events.javadoc: Called when an entity comes into contact with a portal
events.name: EntityPortalEnterEvent

description.ja: プレイヤー以外のエンティティがポータルでテレポートする時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a non-player entity is about to teleport because it is in contact with a portal.

events.javadoc: Called when a non-player entity is about to teleport because it is in contact with a portal. For players see PlayerPortalEvent
events.name: EntityPortalEvent

description.ja: エンティティがポータルを出る時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called before an entity exits a portal.

events.javadoc: Called before an entity exits a portal. This event allows you to modify the velocity of the entity after they have successfully exited the portal.
events.name: EntityPortalExitEvent

description.ja: エンティティが体力を回復する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Stores data for health-regain events.

events.javadoc: Stores data for health-regain events
events.name: EntityRegainHealthEvent

description.ja: 何らかの理由でワールドからエンティティが削除される時に呼び出される。
description.en: Fired anytime an entity is being removed from a world for any reason.

events.javadoc: Fired any time an entity is being removed from a world for any reason
events.name: EntityRemoveFromWorldEvent

description.ja: エンティティが死亡し、復活できる時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an entity dies and may have the opportunity to be resurrected.

events.javadoc: Called when an entity dies and may have the opportunity to be resurrected. Will be called in a cancelled state if the entity does not have a totem equipped.
events.name: EntityResurrectEvent

description.ja: エンティティが弓で矢を放つ時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a LivingEntity shoots a bow firing an arrow.

events.javadoc: Called when a LivingEntity shoots a bow firing an arrow
events.name: EntityShootBowEvent

description.ja: エンティティがスポーンする時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an entity is spawned into a world.

events.javadoc: Called when an entity is spawned into a world. If an Entity Spawn event is cancelled, the entity will not spawn.
events.name: EntitySpawnEvent

description.ja: エンティティを飼い慣らす時に呼び出される。
description.en: Thrown when a LivingEntity is tamed.

events.javadoc: Thrown when a LivingEntity is tamed
events.name: EntityTameEvent

description.ja: 生き物が別のエンティティをターゲットする時、ターゲットを解除する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a creature targets or untargets another entity.

events.javadoc: Called when a creature targets or untargets another entity
events.name: EntityTargetEvent

description.ja: EntityTargetEvent において LivingEntity をターゲットとする時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an Entity targets a LivingEntity.

events.javadoc: Called when an Entity targets a LivingEntity and can only target LivingEntity's.
events.name: EntityTargetLivingEntityEvent

description.ja: プレイヤーではないエンティティがテレポートする時に呼び出される。
description.en: Thrown when a non-player entity is teleported from one location to another.

events.javadoc: Thrown when a non-player entity (such as an Enderman) tries to teleport from one location to another.
events.name: EntityTeleportEvent

description.ja: エンティティの滑空状態が切り替わる時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an entity's gliding status is toggled with an Elytra.

events.javadoc: Sent when an entity's gliding status is toggled with an Elytra. Examples of when this event would be called: Player presses the jump key while in midair and using an Elytra Player lands on ground while they are gliding (with an Elytra) This can be visually estimated by the animation in which a player turns horizontal.
events.name: EntityToggleGlideEvent

description.ja: エンティティからリードが外される時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called immediately prior to an entity being unleashed.

events.javadoc: Called immediately prior to an entity being unleashed.
events.name: EntityUnleashEvent

description.ja: エンティティに落雷が当たった時に呼び出される。
description.en: Fired when lightning strikes an entity.

events.javadoc: Fired when lightning strikes an entity
events.name: EntityZapEvent

description.ja: イベントを表す。
description.en: Represents an event. All events require a static method named getHandlerList() which returns the same HandlerList as getHandlers().

events.javadoc: Represents an event. All events require a static method named getHandlerList() which returns the same HandlerList as getHandlers().
events.name: Event

description.ja: 経験値ボトルから経験値が出る時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a ThrownExpBottle hits and releases experience.

events.javadoc: Called when a ThrownExpBottle hits and releases experience.
events.name: ExpBottleEvent

description.ja: エンティティが爆発する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an entity has made a decision to explode.

events.javadoc: Called when an entity has made a decision to explode.
events.name: ExplosionPrimeEvent

description.ja: 花火が爆発する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a firework explodes.

events.javadoc: Called when a firework explodes.
events.name: FireworkExplodeEvent

description.ja: 空腹度が変化する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a human entity's food level changes.

events.javadoc: Called when a human entity's food level changes
events.name: FoodLevelChangeEvent

description.ja: かまど内でアイテムが燃料として使用される時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an ItemStack is successfully burned as fuel in a furnace.

events.javadoc: Called when an ItemStack is successfully burned as fuel in a furnace.
events.name: FurnaceBurnEvent

description.ja: プレイヤーがかまどからアイテムを取り出す時に呼び出される。
description.en: This event is called when a player takes items out of the furnace.

events.javadoc: This event is called when a player takes items out of the furnace
events.name: FurnaceExtractEvent

description.ja: かまど内でアイテムが精錬される時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an ItemStack is successfully smelted in a furnace.

events.javadoc: Called when an ItemStack is successfully smelted in a furnace.
events.name: FurnaceSmeltEvent

description.ja: エンティティによって壁掛けエンティティが破壊される時に呼び出される。
description.en: Triggered when a hanging entity is removed by an entity.

events.javadoc: Triggered when a hanging entity is removed by an entity
events.name: HangingBreakByEntityEvent

description.ja: 壁掛けエンティティが破壊される時に呼び出される。
description.en: Triggered when a hanging entity is removed.

events.javadoc: Triggered when a hanging entity is removed
events.name: HangingBreakEvent

description.ja: 壁掛けエンティティに関するイベントであることを表す。
description.en: Represents a hanging entity-related event.

events.javadoc: Represents a hanging entity-related event.
events.name: HangingEvent

description.ja: 壁掛けエンティティが設置される時に呼び出される。
description.en: Triggered when a hanging entity is created in the world.

description.ja: インベントリを開いた状態で画面をクリックする時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a player clicks while their inventory is open.

events.javadoc: This event is called when a player clicks a slot in an inventory. Because InventoryClickEvent occurs within a modification of the Inventory, not all Inventory related methods are safe to use. The following should never be invoked by an EventHandler for InventoryClickEvent using the HumanEntity or InventoryView associated with this event: HumanEntity.closeInventory() HumanEntity.openInventory(Inventory) HumanEntity.openWorkbench(Location, boolean) HumanEntity.openEnchanting(Location, boolean) InventoryView.close() To invoke one of these methods, schedule a task using BukkitScheduler.runTask(Plugin, Runnable), which will run the task on the next tick. Also be aware that this is not an exhaustive list, and other methods could potentially create issues as well. Assuming the EntityHuman associated with this event is an instance of a Player, manipulating the MaxStackSize or contents of an Inventory will require an Invocation of Player.updateInventory(). Modifications to slots that are modified by the results of this InventoryClickEvent can be overwritten. To change these slots, this event should be cancelled and all desired changes to the inventory applied. Alternatively, scheduling a task using BukkitScheduler.runTask( Plugin, Runnable), which would execute the task on the next tick, would work as well.
events.name: InventoryClickEvent

description.ja: インベントリを閉じる時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an inventory is closed.

events.javadoc: Represents a player related inventory event
events.name: InventoryCloseEvent

description.ja: クリエイティブモードのプレイヤーがインベントリの操作をした時に呼び出される。呼び出される例を以下に示す。 - インベントリにアイテムを置いた時 - アイテムを拾った時 - インベントリからアイテムをドロップした時
description.en: Called when a creative mode player interacts with their inventory. Examples include: - Placing an item in the inventory - Picking up an item - Dropping an item from the inventory

events.javadoc: This event is called when a player in creative mode puts down or picks up an item in their inventory / hotbar and when they drop items from their Inventory while in creative mode.
events.name: InventoryCreativeEvent

description.ja: インベントリ内でアイテムをドラッグした時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an item is dragged within an inventory.

events.javadoc: This event is called when the player drags an item in their cursor across the inventory. The ItemStack is distributed across the slots the HumanEntity dragged over. The method of distribution is described by the DragType returned by getType(). Canceling this event will result in none of the changes described in getNewItems() being applied to the Inventory. Because InventoryDragEvent occurs within a modification of the Inventory, not all Inventory related methods are safe to use. The following should never be invoked by an EventHandler for InventoryDragEvent using the HumanEntity or InventoryView associated with this event. HumanEntity.closeInventory() HumanEntity.openInventory(Inventory) HumanEntity.openWorkbench(Location, boolean) HumanEntity.openEnchanting(Location, boolean) InventoryView.close() To invoke one of these methods, schedule a task using BukkitScheduler.runTask(Plugin, Runnable), which will run the task on the next tick. Also be aware that this is not an exhaustive list, and other methods could potentially create issues as well. Assuming the EntityHuman associated with this event is an instance of a Player, manipulating the MaxStackSize or contents of an Inventory will require an Invocation of Player.updateInventory(). Any modifications to slots that are modified by the results of this InventoryDragEvent will be overwritten. To change these slots, this event should be cancelled and the changes applied. Alternatively, scheduling a task using BukkitScheduler.runTask(Plugin, Runnable), which would execute the task on the next tick, would work as well.
events.name: InventoryDragEvent

description.ja: インベントリに関するイベントであることを表す。

description.ja: エンティティやホッパー等のブロックがインベントリ内のアイテムを別のインベントリに移動させる時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an entity or block (e.g., hopper) moves items from one inventory to another.

events.javadoc: Called when some entity or block (e.g. hopper) tries to move items directly from one inventory to another. When this event is called, the initiator may already have removed the item from the source inventory and is ready to move it into the destination inventory. If this event is cancelled, the items will be returned to the source inventory, if needed. If this event is not cancelled, the initiator will try to put the ItemStack into the destination inventory. If this is not possible and the ItemStack has not been modified, the source inventory slot will be restored to its former state. Otherwise any additional items will be discarded.
events.name: InventoryMoveItemEvent

description.ja: プレイヤーが実行したコマンドが処理される前に呼び出される。
description.en: Called before a player's command is processed.

events.javadoc: This event is called whenever a player runs a command (by placing a slash at the start of their message). It is called early in the command handling process, and modifications in this event (via setMessage(String)) will be shown in the behavior. Many plugins will have no use for this event, and you should attempt to avoid using it if it is not necessary. Some examples of valid uses for this event are: Logging executed commands to a separate file Variable substitution. For example, replacing ${nearbyPlayer} with the name of the nearest other player, or simulating the @a and @p decorators used by Command Blocks in plugins that do not handle it. Conditionally blocking commands belonging to other plugins. For example, blocking the use of the /home command in a combat arena. Per-sender command aliases. For example, after a player runs the command /calias cr gamemode creative, the next time they run /cr, it gets replaced into /gamemode creative. (Global command aliases should be done by registering the alias.) Examples of incorrect uses are: Using this event to run command logic If the event is cancelled, processing of the command will halt. The state of whether or not there is a slash (/) at the beginning of the message should be preserved. If a slash is added or removed, unexpected behavior may result.
events.name: PlayerCommandPreprocessEvent

events.javadoc: This event will fire when a player is finishing consuming an item (food, potion, milk bucket). If the ItemStack is modified the server will use the effects of the new item and not remove the original one from the player's inventory. If the event is cancelled the effect will not be applied and the item will not be removed from the player's inventory.

events.javadoc: Used for plugin enable and disable events

description.en: Called when a portal is created.

events.javadoc: Called when a portal is created
events.name: PortalCreateEvent

description.ja: ポーションが割れる時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a splash potion hits an area.

events.javadoc: Called when a splash potion hits an area
events.name: PotionSplashEvent

description.ja: Mojang API を用いてプロファイルを検索する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a plugin searches for a profile using the Mojang API.

events.javadoc: Allows a plugin to intercept a Profile Lookup for a Profile by name At the point of event fire, the UUID and properties are unset. If a plugin sets the UUID, and optionally the properties, the API call to look up the profile may be skipped. No guarantees are made about thread execution context for this event. If you need to know, check event.isAsync()
events.name: PreLookupProfileEvent

description.ja: 金床の使用準備が出来た時に呼び出される。完成アイテムが表示される毎に発生する。
description.en: Called when an item is put in a slot for repair by an anvil.

events.javadoc: Called when an item is put in a slot for repair by an anvil.
events.name: PrepareAnvilEvent

description.ja: クラフトの準備が出来た時に呼び出される。材料を並べ、完成アイテムが表示される毎に発生する。
description.en: Called when crafting is prepared. Triggered each time materials are arranged and the resulting item is displayed.

description.ja: エンチャントの準備が出来た時に呼び出される。完成アイテムが表示される毎に発生する。
description.en: Called when an ItemStack is inserted in an enchantment table - can be called multiple times.

events.javadoc: Called when an ItemStack is inserted in an enchantment table - can be called multiple times
events.name: PrepareItemEnchantEvent

description.ja: プレイヤーがホワイトリストに登録されているか確認する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Fires when the server needs to verify if a player is whitelisted.

events.javadoc: Fires when the server needs to verify if a player is whitelisted. Plugins may override/control the servers whitelist with this event, and dynamically change the kick message.
events.name: ProfileWhitelistVerifyEvent

description.ja: Projectile がエンティティと衝突する時に呼び出される。キャンセルすると Projectile は飛び続ける。
description.en: Called when a projectile collides with an entity. This event is called before EntityDamageByEntityEvent, and cancelling it will allow the projectile to continue flying.

events.javadoc: Called when an projectile collides with an entity This event is called before EntityDamageByEntityEvent, and cancelling it will allow the projectile to continue flying
events.name: ProjectileCollideEvent

description.ja: Projectile がエンティティに当たる時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a projectile hits an object.

events.javadoc: Called when a projectile hits an object
events.name: ProjectileHitEvent

description.ja: Projectile が発射される時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a projectile is launched.

events.javadoc: Called when a projectile is launched.
events.name: ProjectileLaunchEvent

description.ja: RCON を介してコマンド入力を受け取った時に呼び出される。
description.en: This event is called when a command is received over RCON.

events.javadoc: This event is called when a command is recieved over RCON. See the javadocs of ServerCommandEvent for more information.
events.name: RemoteServerCommandEvent

description.ja: プレイヤー以外がコマンドを実行する時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a command is executed by a non-player.

events.javadoc: This event is called when a command is run by a non-player. It is called early in the command handling process, and modifications in this event (via setCommand(String)) will be shown in the behavior. Many plugins will have no use for this event, and you should attempt to avoid using it if it is not necessary. Some examples of valid uses for this event are: Logging executed commands to a separate file Variable substitution. For example, replacing ${ip:Steve} with the connection IP of the player named Steve, or simulating the @a and @p decorators used by Command Blocks for plugins that do not handle it. Conditionally blocking commands belonging to other plugins. Per-sender command aliases. For example, after the console runs the command /calias cr gamemode creative, the next time they run /cr, it gets replaced into /gamemode creative. (Global command aliases should be done by registering the alias.) Examples of incorrect uses are: Using this event to run command logic If the event is cancelled, processing of the command will halt. The state of whether or not there is a slash (/) at the beginning of the message should be preserved. If a slash is added or removed, unexpected behavior may result.
events.name: ServerCommandEvent

description.ja: サーバーに関するイベントであることを表す。
description.en: Represents server-related events.

events.javadoc: Miscellaneous server events
events.name: ServerEvent

description.ja: 回復可能な状況で例外が発生した時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when an exception occurs in a recoverable situation.

events.javadoc: Called whenever an exception is thrown in a recoverable section of the server.
events.name: ServerExceptionEvent

description.ja: サーバーリストの表示内容を送る要求を受けた時に呼び出される。PaperServerListPingEvent を使うことでより詳細の情報を扱うことができる。
description.en: Called when a server list ping request is received.

events.javadoc: Called when a server list ping is coming in. Displayed players can be checked and removed by iterating over this event.
events.name: ServerListPingEvent

description.ja: サービスに関するイベントであることを表す。
description.en: Represents service-related events.

events.javadoc: An event relating to a registered service. This is called in a ServicesManager
events.name: ServiceEvent

description.ja: サービスが登録された時に呼び出される。
description.en: Called when a service is registered.

events.javadoc: This event is called when a service is registered. Warning: The order in which register and unregister events are called should not be relied upon.
events.name: ServiceRegisterEvent

description.en: Called when a service is unregistered.

events.javadoc: This event is called when a service is unregistered. Warning: The order in which register and unregister events are called should not be relied upon.

description.ja: 植物が成長する時に呼び出される。以下に例を示す。 - 苗木が木に成長する時 - キノコが巨大キノコに成長する時
